title: lathyrus japonicus f. acutifolius
intro: Lathyrus japonicus f. acutifolius, also known as Japanese pea or white pea, is a perennial legume plant that belongs to the pea family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and act as an antispasmodic. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in herbal medicine to treat various conditions, including hypertension and digestive issues.
